observations.trend: SPX and QQQ remain above 20-day and 50-day moving averages, but IWM is rolling over
observations.volatility: VIX rose from 13.8 to 18.6 in four sessions
observations.breadth: Advance-decline line flattened and leadership narrowed to semis and megacap software
observations.liquidity: Intraday reversals are larger and late-day closes are less stable
